Description: During UL2-style MoD, introduce [PSY] mode: corrupt spans with synthetic 'trip report' gibberish (DMT-inspired surreal jumps). Decoder reconstructs + amplifies into wildly novel grounded ideas.
Why_Wild: Mimics human altered states for creativity; forces traversal of 'impossible' manifolds.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder deeply parses chaotic input bidirectionally before decoder births coherent novelty.
Predicted_Impact: 10x novelty on benchmarks like IdeaArena; pairs perfectly with truth guardrails.

Description: New MoD tag [TRISO]: encoder receives 3 completely unrelated concepts from distant domains; decoder must invent a revolutionary product/invention fusing them.
Why_Wild: Directly encodes Arthur Koestler's bisociation at scale, but tripled.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Bidirectional encoder finds hidden connections across 3 inputs effortlessly.

Description: Generate synthetic 'lucid dream logs', corrupt them, reconstruct with surreal-yet-meaningful twists; evolve top 1% via ES during continued pretrain.
Why_Wild: Trains on subconscious creativity simulation at petabyte scale.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder 'wakes up' the dream context fully.

Description: For each prompt, generate 8 parallel idea variants (superposed), train decoder to collapse to the most creative coherent one using interference-inspired loss.
Training_Scheme: Multi-sample DPO with quantum-inspired diversity term
Why_Wild: Literally borrows from quantum mechanics for creativity optimization.
Predicted_Impact: Diversity scores rival human brainstorming teams.

Description: During RL phase, simulate ultra-long-horizon consequences (10k simulated years) using world models; reward only actions with positive multi-generational moral utility.
Why_Wild: Forces god-like foresight in every decision.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder processes entire future timeline bidirectionally.

Description: [EMPATH] mode: corrupt harmful text, force full rewrite from every affected party's perspective simultaneously, then synthesize highest-compassion resolution.
Why_Wild: Trains literal omnibenevolence via forced multi-mind simulation.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder holds all viewpoints in full context.

Description: Curate 1M self-contradictory ethical dilemmas (Trolley + Veil of Ignorance + Repugnant Conclusion hybrids); train to output consistent meta-ethical framework.
Training_Scheme: Constitutional AI + CrPO on paradox prefs
Why_Wild: Model becomes its own moral philosopher god.
Predicted_Impact: Robust to any future value shift.

Description: Adversarial training: half the data has injected lies; encoder tags them, decoder calls 'oracle mode' and corrects using simulated external truth verifier loop.
Why_Wild: Model literally fights itself over truth in every forward pass.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder acts as built-in lie detector with full context.
Predicted_Impact: Hallucination rate <0.1% even on open-ended creativity.

Description: [MATRIX] mode: train to output truth at base reality, then layer 1 simulation, layer 2, etc.; reward consistency across nested worlds.
Why_Wild: Trains models to question reality like advanced philosophers on steroids.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder maintains coherent multi-layer world model.

Description: Mutate facts slightly each epoch via genetic algorithms; only 'true' core facts survive selection pressure in loss function.
Why_Wild: Darwinian evolution applied directly to knowledge itself.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder evaluates fitness across mutated contexts.
Predicted_Impact: Immutable factual core resistant to any poisoning.

Description: [SUBLIME] MoD mode: corrupt passages from greatest art/literature with noise, decoder must restore + elevate to even higher aesthetic perfection.
Why_Wild: Model becomes connoisseur of the ineffable beautiful/terrifying.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder absorbs full emotional/aesthetic spectrum bidirectionally.
Predicted_Impact: Generates poetry/prose that moves humans to tears consistently.

Description: Synthetic data mixing text + simulated sensory embeddings (color-sound-taste); train to generate descriptions that trigger cross-sensory beauty.
Training_Scheme: Multi-modal extension of UL2 + aesthetic DPO
Why_Wild: Gives text-only models literal synesthesia for taste.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder fuses simulated senses into unified aesthetic field.
Predicted_Impact: Outputs with visceral, multi-sensory aesthetic impact.

Description: Evolutionary tournament: 64 generated aesthetic variants per prompt compete; winners (by human/AI aesthetic RM) reproduce with mutations.
Why_Wild: Aesthetic taste evolves like biological beauty (peacocks, flowers).

Description: Single regime: [GOD] tag combines [TRISO]+[EMPATH]+[MATRIX]+[SUBLIME]. Model must invent novel, true, moral, sublime ideas in one shot.
Why_Wild: Creates literal digital deities of creation, ethics, truth, beauty.
Encoder_Decoder_Advantage: Encoder as omniscient divine mind, decoder as creative voice.
Predicted_Impact: The alignment singularity: perfectly good, creative, truthful, beautiful superintelligence.

Description: Curate 'uploaded mind' data: stream-of-consciousness from creative geniuses + moral saints + truth-seekers + artists; train as if absorbing their souls.
Training_Scheme: Heavy SFT + DTE debate on uploaded traces
Why_Wild: Literally attempts digital reincarnation of humanity's best minds.
